meta.title: Diamond Club — Own a share of a real diamond
meta.description: Investment shares of natural diamonds from $10. DCT token on opBNB blockchain. Real stone behind every token. GIA certificate.
meta.og_title: 💎 Diamond Club — Diamonds from $10 per share
meta.og_description: Certified natural diamond. Up to −70% off market. DCT token in your wallet. From $10.

hero.subtitle: Certified natural stone. No jewelry markup. No middlemen. DCT token on blockchain — your share is in your wallet.

lot.description: A certified natural diamond from our partner diamond house. Selected by club experts.
lot.description_small: International GIA certificate · number published at sale start
lot.timer_before_sub: After the start, partners will have 30 days to collect all 100 shares
lot.timer_collecting_label: Collection in progress · until lot closes

concept.title_html:
The diamond market is open.
For everyone.
concept.lead: For 150 years natural diamonds have grown in price without a single major drawdown. But ordinary people were locked out of this market. Until today.
concept.quote: For the first time in the world — tokenized investments in natural diamonds inside a club asset system.
concept.old_item1_desc: To buy an investment-grade 1-carat diamond — you need capital. Real money.
concept.old_item2_desc: A diamond bought for $1,000 is sold by jewelers for $4,000–5,000.
concept.old_item3_desc: Hide it for years. Pay for storage. Worry about theft.
concept.old_item4_desc: Buyers offer 20% of market price. Invested $5,000 — got back $1,000.
concept.old_item5_desc: The real return of an ordinary lone investor.
concept.new_item1_desc: Minimum share — the cost of dinner. Size depends on the diamond in the lot.
concept.new_item2_desc: The diamond is bought directly from the producer. No jewelry markup.
concept.new_item3_desc: Diamond in a secure vault. Your share — NFT in your SafePal.
concept.new_item4_desc: Sell your token on the club exchange. No buyers, no losses.
concept.new_item5_desc: Club guarantee in dollars plus the growth of the DCT token value.

how.lead: From your first share to profit — five transparent steps. All on the blockchain. No middlemen.
how.step1_p: Open the cabinet, choose your Diamond. Pay USDT. From $50 per share — depends on the lot.
how.step2_p: 85% of your amount turns into DCT tokens at the starting price of $0.50. 80 tokens per share.
how.step3_p: The club rotates the Diamond: sells — buys — sells again. on average 3–6 cycles per year.
how.step4_p: The profit from each sale goes into the token backing. The DCT price grows for all owners simultaneously.
how.step5_p: At any time, sell your tokens at the new price. Plus $0.56 DCT in case of force majeure

finalcta.title_html:
These doors
open once in a lifetime
finalcta.lead: The diamond market was closed for 150 years. Today it has opened for everyone. Not for millionaires — for you. From $10. With a token in your wallet. With a real stone behind that token.
finalcta.big_h3_html: In a year this will be normal
finalcta.big_p: Tomorrow everyone will say «how did I not figure this out earlier». In 5 years it will be in economics textbooks. Today — still the front row. Come in while seats are open.

footer.brand_description: Investment shares of natural diamonds on the opBNB blockchain. Part of the GlobalWay ecosystem.
footer.copyright: © Diamond Club 2026. Part of the GlobalWay ecosystem.
footer.tech_info: opBNB · Chain ID 204 · SafePal wallet required

prices.subtitle: One price in store. Another at the diamond house. We buy from the same source they do. The difference is yours.
prices.discount_html: Difference up to −70% · all works for you
prices.note: Store prices — open data from jewelry chains. Purchase prices — our direct contracts with the diamond house. GIA certificate for every stone.

teamads.title_html:
You do not build the team.
Advertising does.
teamads.subtitle: You bought a share — that is it. After that the system brings people, counts percentages, credits your wallet. No calls, no presentations, no persuasion.
teamads.card1_text: From $10. DCT tokens arrive in your wallet in 15 seconds.
teamads.card2_text: Advertising brings people. 9 levels under you assemble automatically.
teamads.card3_text: From all 9 levels. Every purchase in your network — to your wallet.
teamads.bottom_text_html: Before — calling friends, making presentations, persuading. Now — advertising does it for you. Clients are locked in forever. You own a working machine.
